ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>The response is contextually relevant, maintains persona consistency with the Witch oracle's cryptic nature but loses a point for naturalness due to slightly unnatural phrasing.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>3<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>The response is somewhat relevant and consistent in persona, with decent naturalness; however, it lacks contextual relevance as the urgency of healing potions isn't addressed.
